chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No. D-3612 of 2022 _______________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge _______________________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of CMA No. 19653/22 2. For order on office objection No. 4 & 18. 3. For hearing of CMA No. 15906/22. (stay) 4. For hearing Main Case. -------------- 18.08.2022. Mr. Faizan Memon alongwiht Syed Zaeem Hyder, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. ________ Through this Petition, the Petitioner had primarily prayed that her case be considered for promotion from BS-19 to BS-20. Comments have been filed and Para Nos. 3 & 4 of the said comments reads as under:- “3. It is further submitted that in recent past Health Department has prepared a new Draft Seniority List of Senior Women Medical Officers (BS-19) by deleting the names of already promoted and retired Senior Women Medical Officers (BS- 19) and according to new draft seniority list the number of the petitioner is at Serial No.4. 4. It is pertinent to point out that this department shall prepare the working paper in near future for promotions of Senior Women Medical Officers BS-19 to BS-20 and the petitioner shall also be considered for the same.” In view of above, since the Respondents have stated that the Petitioner’s case would be considered in the next P.S.B. The Petition has served its purpose and is accordingly disposed of with pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz P.S.
